closed_positions.name: Verra Mobility Corporation
closed_positions.exit_reasoning: VRRM is in catastrophic drawdown: -71.82% after day 0 on the Google Search I/O trigger. The current flag re-surfaces VRRM with threat_assessment='none' and strong filings evidence (municipal contracts, camera hardware, court-admissible evidentiary chains have zero search-overhaul exposure). However, the 10-Q already flags a critical real risk: 'loss of one of the three large Commercial Services customers currently in renewal.' This is NOT sympathy-fade territory; this is idiosyncratic deterioration on a real business risk. The -71% move suggests the market has priced in customer loss or regulatory bans (Ontario speed-enforcement ban is real). Holding a position this destroyed on a 5-15 day clock violates the discipline — the sympathy thesis is drowned out by fundamental risk. Exit immediately.
